name: Mideastern Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, and saffron in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Rub the mixture evenly on chicken pieces.
4. Place remaining ingredients (olives, white wine, onion) in a pan with the chicken.
5. Cover and simmer over low heat for 20-30 minutes.
6. Serve with lemon rice.
